title: spergularia macrorrhiza var. rupestris
intro: Spergularia macrorrhiza var. rupestris, also known as mountain sandwort or rock sandwort, is a plant species within the Caryophyllaceae family. It is primarily found in alpine regions, particularly in Europe and Asia, where it grows in rocky areas and mountainous terrain. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Spergularia macrorrhiza var. rupestris include its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce fever, and it is often prepared as a herbal tea or tincture.
